name: WeSC AB (publ)
summary: WeSC AB (publ) develops and sells streetwear clothes and accessories for men and women in Sweden and internationally. Its products include hoodies, tanks, T-shirts, shirts, jackets, pants, denim, joggers, shorts, swim suits, and underwear, as well as bags, hats and slides, socks, gift cards, and mystery boxes. The company sells products under the WeSC brand name, as well as through stores and web sales. WeSC AB (publ) was founded in 1999 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
